title: bromus ramosus var. hirsutus
intro: Bromus ramosus var. hirsutus, also known as hairy wood brome, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. The health benefits of hairy wood brome are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Hairy wood brome can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
